cases.question: In `celery.worker.strategy.default`, what real class does `task.Request` resolve to?

cases.question: 当线程中没有 current app 且未设置 `CELERY_LOADER` 时，首次访问 `celery.current_app.loader` 最终会实例化哪个 Loader 类？

implicit_deps: 环境变量 CELERY_LOADER 未设置时使用默认 loader 名称 'default'
线程局部 current_app 为空时会回退到默认应用 default_app
首次访问 current_app.loader 会延迟触发 loader 初始化并通过 get_loader_cls('default') 解析到 celery.loaders.default:Loader
最终实例化的 Loader 类是 celery.loaders.default.Loader

cases.raw_output: {"ground_truth":{"direct_deps":["celery/_state.py","celery/app/base.py","celery/loaders/__init__.py","celery/loaders/default.py"],"indirect_deps":["os"],"implicit_deps":["环境变量 CELERY_LOADER 未设置时使用默认 loader 名称 'default'","线程局部 current_app 为空时会回退到默认应用 default_app","首次访问 current_app.loader 会延迟触发 loader 初始化并通过 get_loader_cls('default') 解析到 celery.loaders.default:Loader","最终实例化的 Loader 类是 celery.loaders.default.Loader"]}}

cases.question: 在 `app.autodiscover_tasks(..., force=False)` 的 lazy 路径下，真正被触发执行的目标函数是什么，以及它由哪条调用链触发？

implicit_deps: lazy路径下真正执行的目标函数是 Celery._autodiscover_tasks(packages, related_name)

触发调用链为：Celery.autodiscover_tasks(..., force=False) -> signals.import_modules.connect(starpromise(self._autodiscover_tasks, packages, related_name), weak=False, sender=self) -> loader.import_default_modules() 发送 import_modules 信号 -> 该 promise 被调用 -> Celery._autodiscover_tasks(...)
若 packages 为空，则进一步进入 Celery._autodiscover_tasks_from_fixups() -> fixup.autodiscover_tasks()（如 Django fixup）

cases.raw_output: {"ground_truth":{"direct_deps":["celery/app/base.py:Celery.autodiscover_tasks","celery/app/base.py:Celery._autodiscover_tasks","celery/app/base.py:Celery._autodiscover_tasks_from_fixups","celery/fixups/django.py:fixup.autodiscover_tasks"],"indirect_deps":["celery/signals.py:import_modules.connect(starpromise(self._autodiscover_tasks, packages, related_name))","kombu/utils/functional.py:starpromise","celery/loaders/base.py:BaseLoader.import_default_modules"],"implicit_deps":["lazy路径下真正执行的目标函数是 Celery._autodiscover_tasks(packages, related_name)","触发调用链为：Celery.autodiscover_tasks(..., force=False) -> signals.import_modules.connect(starpromise(self._autodiscover_tasks, packages, related_name), weak=False, sender=self) -> loader.import_default_modules() 发送 import_modules 信号 -> 该 promise 被调用 -> Celery._autodiscover_tasks(...)","若 packages 为空，则进一步进入 Celery._autodiscover_tasks_from_fixups() -> fixup.autodiscover_tasks()（如 Django fixup）"]}}

cases.question: 在满足 Django fixup 前置条件（`DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE` 已设置、`django` 可导入、且 `app.loader_cls` 不含 `django`）且未自定义 `task_cls` 时，`app.Task` 的最终基类解析到哪个真实类？

cases.question: `_state._get_current_app` 懒创建 fallback app 后，首次访问 `app.loader` 时，最终实例化到哪个具体 Loader 类？

implicit_deps: 配置项 loader 或 CELERY_LOADER 环境变量影响符号解析；若未设置则回退到 default Loader
当前 app 的 app.loader 属性会调用 get_loader_cls(self.loader_cls) 并缓存实例
fallback app 由 _state._get_current_app 懒创建时使用 Celery('default', fixups=[], set_as_current=False, loader=os.environ.get('CELERY_LOADER') or 'default')，因此首次访问最终默认实例化为 celery.loaders.default.Loader

cases.raw_output: {"ground_truth":{"direct_deps":["celery/_state.py","celery/app/base.py","celery/loaders/__init__.py","celery/loaders/default.py"],"indirect_deps":["celery/loaders/base.py","kombu/utils/imports.py"],"implicit_deps":["配置项 loader 或 CELERY_LOADER 环境变量影响符号解析；若未设置则回退到 default Loader","当前 app 的 app.loader 属性会调用 get_loader_cls(self.loader_cls) 并缓存实例","fallback app 由 _state._get_current_app 懒创建时使用 Celery('default', fixups=[], set_as_current=False, loader=os.environ.get('CELERY_LOADER') or 'default')，因此首次访问最终默认实例化为 celery.loaders.default.Loader"]}}

cases.question: When Celery app is initialized, how does it resolve the fixup classes from the builtin_fixups set?

direct_deps: celery/app/base.py: Celery.__init__ reads self.builtin_fixups and computes self.fixups = set(self.builtin_fixups) if fixups is None else fixups
celery/app/base.py: Celery.__init__ resolves each fixup entry with symbol_by_name(fixup)(self) in the comprehension self._fixups = [symbol_by_name(fixup)(self) for fixup in self.fixups]
indirect_deps: kombu.utils.imports.symbol_by_name: imports/resolves a string like 'celery.fixups.django:fixup' to the actual callable/class
resolved fixup callable/class: invoked with the app instance as (self) to create/install the fixup object
implicit_deps: fixup entries in builtin_fixups/fixups must be importable symbolic names or already-resolved callables acceptable to symbol_by_name
the resolved fixup is expected to be callable with one argument: the Celery app instance

cases.raw_output: {"ground_truth":{"direct_deps":["celery/app/base.py: Celery.__init__ reads self.builtin_fixups and computes self.fixups = set(self.builtin_fixups) if fixups is None else fixups","celery/app/base.py: Celery.__init__ resolves each fixup entry with symbol_by_name(fixup)(self) in the comprehension self._fixups = [symbol_by_name(fixup)(self) for fixup in self.fixups]","celery/app/base.py: builtin_fixups default value includes 'celery.fixups.django:fixup'"],"indirect_deps":["kombu.utils.imports.symbol_by_name: imports/resolves a string like 'celery.fixups.django:fixup' to the actual callable/class","resolved fixup callable/class: invoked with the app instance as (self) to create/install the fixup object"],"implicit_deps":["fixup entries in builtin_fixups/fixups must be importable symbolic names or already-resolved callables acceptable to symbol_by_name","the resolved fixup is expected to be callable with one argument: the Celery app instance"]}}
